job_title: Sr Data Analyst - Remote - Healthcare Exp - Advance SQL Mandatory - 9+ years
job_description:
# Sr Data Analyst - Remote - Healthcare Exp - Advance SQL Mandatory - 9+ years
Company: SUNRAY INFORMATICS
Source: Dice
Employment type: Contract
Checked: April 27, 2026
URL: https://www.dice.com/job-detail/d7300e20-6eaf-45ea-9a4d-f902224ec3b2

## Highlights
- Remote senior data analyst contract with healthcare experience requirement.
- Calls for advanced SQL, data warehousing, source-to-target transformation documents, ETL/ELT analysis, SDLC familiarity, Agile, and test case creation.
- Strong fit on SQL, ETL validation, mapping, and testing; stretch mainly on 9+ years requirement.
strengths: Very strong overlap with SQL, source-to-target validation, ETL analysis, Agile, and test case design.
Resume already emphasizes mapping documents, validation assets, and healthcare domain work.
Contract remote format fits current target profile.
gaps: Posting asks for 9+ years; resume supports 7+ years.
Title is more senior than current headline, so tailoring should emphasize depth rather than inflate years.
notes: Good fit despite years-of-experience stretch. Emphasize source-to-target mapping, ETL/ELT validation, SQL depth, test case design, and Agile delivery. Do not alter years of experience or overstate title seniority.

replacements.find: ETL Analyst | Healthcare Data Analyst | Data Quality & Warehouse Analyst
replacements.replace: Healthcare ETL & Data Analyst | Advanced SQL | Source-to-Target Validation

replacements.find: Healthcare Data & ETL Analyst with 7+ years of experience validating, reconciling, and delivering trusted enterprise data across healthcare (payer), banking, retail, and e-commerce domains. Deep hands-on expertise in advanced SQL, ETL validation, source-to-target testing, data quality, data warehousing, and production data support. Currently extending core skills into Snowflake, Databricks, Azure Data Factory, and Python to support cloud modernization and AI-ready data pipelines. Proven partner to engineering, QA, and business stakeholders—translating mapping documents and business rules into validation frameworks that protect reporting accuracy, regulatory compliance, and downstream analytics readiness.
replacements.replace: Healthcare Data & ETL Analyst with 7+ years of experience validating, reconciling, and delivering trusted enterprise data across healthcare and other large-scale environments. Deep hands-on expertise in advanced SQL, ETL validation, source-to-target testing, data quality, data warehousing, and production data support. Strong fit for analyst roles that require mapping interpretation, ETL/ELT analysis, test case design, and Agile collaboration.

replacements.find: Source-to-target testing, record counts, duplicate / null / referential / business-rule checks, root-cause analysis, defect triage
replacements.replace: Source-to-target testing, record counts, duplicate / null / referential / business-rule checks, root-cause analysis, defect triage, ETL/ELT validation

replacements.find: Built a library of 300+ reusable validation test cases from mapping documents and business rules—covering record counts, duplicates, nulls, referential integrity, and business-rule logic—adopted across the QA team to standardize testing and reduce ramp time for new analysts.
replacements.replace: Built a library of 300+ reusable validation test cases from mapping documents and business rules—covering record counts, duplicates, nulls, referential integrity, and business-rule logic—to strengthen ETL validation quality and improve analyst ramp-up.
